{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016395006BC072C7F04A9E70065"}"},"total":236},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7491124838133302041","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级无敌好看！！！女主宝宝是世界最可爱的小木头！！超级无敌萌以人类现有的自制力还不足以抵御唐离这种萌物的！！我们大女人就是要看这些萌物才能在外面讨生活啊！不止性格萌，女主宝宝也超有实力，遇到事情超级冷静完美解决，苗三牛那一段我看的都害怕，但是女主宝宝特别棒保护好了自己！！静姐和房东还有民警都是好人，辣条弟弟也很可爱，云生姐酒鱼也好！作者大大超级会写，唐离塑造的超级有魅力，非常能理解为什么大家都喜欢她，我也好喜欢好喜欢，在遇到困难时，不会让女主等着别人来救，而是自己救自己，写的超好！！前期一直没有写土豆长什么样，直到和云生姐姐打电话才出来，好像我们也是跟着一起第一次见面一样，超级好看！期待后面！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744169363,"group_id":"7398025759794662424","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9e7uORJn7hEFlJwWyLnJfB3VGrcawVHxkoa/VM+ZH/j","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c4b5767e0f5448b1b1c47d41e764352c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536976&x-signature=qh6jzh8vbkH8i6KIWLdFmhdNVug%3D","user_id":"3719005903533200","user_name":"路人猫猫🐈‍⬛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3719005903533200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7398025759794662424","book_info":{"abstract":"［和平+伪万人迷+全员单箭头+非女强+慢节奏+微虐+bg+gl］
早逝的妈，没影的爸，冷漠的亲戚和脑子缺根筋的她。
唐离因与主播撞车的一把游戏被人看见，成了一位游戏陪玩。
为了填饱肚子，唐离真的很认真在打游戏，可是为什么身边的人会问她要不要谈恋爱？
而在其它人的视角。
她天天和我打游戏，她一定喜欢我。
她叫我宝宝，她一定喜欢我。
她给我做饭吃，她一定喜欢我。
她看我了，她一定喜欢我。
（女主有不正常的爱慕者，但不会伤害到女主。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc44def8dfe0641c73a30505f09b7f421~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"巴罗箱觉普掏肝","author_id":"","book_id":"7398025759794662424","book_name":"关于打游戏顺便成了万人迷这件事","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2570人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460913698891104792","read_count":"2570","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"391392"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"175","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,直播,游戏主播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d7d8a7149a077b038591d54a03cbddfc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179990&x-signature=tuA%2B%2FTp8rwucKlZqIctj3sJYn8w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4428430230949655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"83"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016395006BC072C7F04A9E70065"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6750,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5656},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1744177263,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7487457172258603838","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好喜欢超级认真像小狗一样的小人机妹宝啊，宇宙无敌可爱好吗[已种草][书架加一][雀食神作]大大能不能突然发出十几万字吓我一跳，每天都在等饭[快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743315129,"group_id":"7398025759794662424","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1VRGD3bMr4m9lkYpQklcpO9YlKP9C7HvvUvapObCWvJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/25d343cbae304c7abfd454a4af86d0c6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534887&x-signature=WMVSt%2BzKfrHMaCEKZnFBZrf8l3g%3D","user_id":"2634018410477035","user_name":"姒姒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2634018410477035","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7398025759794662424","book_info":{"abstract":"［和平+伪万人迷+全员单箭头+非女强+慢节奏+微虐+bg+gl］

（女主有不正常的爱慕者，但不会伤害到女主。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc44def8dfe0641c73a30505f09b7f421~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"巴罗箱觉普掏肝","author_id":"","book_id":"7398025759794662424","book_name":"关于打游戏顺便成了万人迷这件事","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2570人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460913698891104792","read_count":"2570","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"391392"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"175","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,直播,游戏主播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d7d8a7149a077b038591d54a03cbddfc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179990&x-signature=tuA%2B%2FTp8rwucKlZqIctj3sJYn8w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4428430230949655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016395006BC072C7F04A9E70065"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5719,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4905},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1743327201,"author_reply_time":1743379724,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7505432799707054873","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，作者大大写的很好！虽然是万人迷，但不像其他文一样，强调女主的外貌或者身材又或者平平无奇（因为自己一开始想看万人迷，却老是找到那种女主长得超级漂亮或者身材很好又或者有万人迷光环所以成了万人迷，感觉不像喜欢上女主，而且有时候看挺尬的，当然有时看的挺爽可以不用这么多脑子，但是看多了也会腻的）唐离宝宝真的好可爱，呆呆的像个小人机一样，但是对待朋友很真诚，就是以前过得好惨，不想再让唐离宝宝受苦了（感觉唐离宝宝就是因为受苦太多懂得又不多所以才呆呆的不是刻意的人设相反你可以触摸到她的想法就像见到一个鲜活的生命），总之希望唐离宝宝可以苦尽甘来！","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":17,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773995990A9E70065%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227505432799707054873%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227398025759794662424%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747498779,"group_id":"7398025759794662424","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女主控","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1o9hpZrDYurApyhGdn9Bmo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6845d55a93d04d728383508c433bfd37~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528229&x-signature=OAvdFFhUQhYyVhhdc4vCM1CugUg%3D","user_id":"96830825049","user_name":"我允许了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"96830825049","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_col
